title: Mamien

'''Mamiens''' were large [[Primate/Legends|simian]] creatures native to [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]].<ref name="SoR" /> They were solitary creatures, shy and skittish, and difficult to approach.<ref name="SWG:M">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=loading|Mamien|Yavin 4}}</ref> They also possessed a curious and casual demeanor. However, they were very protective of their young and might turn violent if their infant was threatened.<ref name="SoR" /> Mamiens used to walk on two legs but they could occasionally walk on four.<ref name="SWG:M" /> The creatures possessed a wooly hide.<ref name="SWG" />

[[File:Mamien.jpg|thumb|left|200px|A male mamien, native to Yavin 4.]]

Following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the collector [[Breac Slaus]] tasked a group of spacers to hunt and kill an unreasonable number of mamiens.<ref name="SWG:MM">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=collection|Mamien Maimer}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Mamien_concept_art.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Concept art for ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.]]
Mamiens appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref>

While [[Empire 15|''Empire'' 15]] depicts the Mamien as very ferocious creature that attacks [[Biggs Darklighter/Legends|Biggs Darklighter]] unprovoked, the mamiens in ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' were rather docile and non-aggressive.
